title: Ensemble Remix Studies
description: Five independent prestige-TV key art studies that cast different fictional worlds into the grammar of premium streaming ensemble campaigns.
creative_direction: Each image is a standalone key art study with its own cast, setting, and tension system. The common rule is prestige-streaming discipline: one clear lead, credible secondary hierarchy, controlled spacing, and a polished campaign finish that implies platform-ready marketing rather than a generic group portrait.

en.title: Ensemble Remix Studies
en.description: Five independent prestige-TV key art studies that cast different fictional worlds into the grammar of premium streaming ensemble campaigns.

zh-CN.title: 阵容换皮研究
zh-CN.description: 五张独立的精品剧集主视觉研究,把不同虚构世界的人物阵容放入流媒体 ensemble campaign 的海报语法中。
